Lyrics.text:
Ho avy indray
Eny an-danitra ambony
Ilay Tomponay,
Tsy ho ela intsony.
He! Faly izahay
Fa hilaozana itony.
Moa vonona va

Lyrics.label: ref
Lyrics.text:
Avy indray,(avy indray)
Miomàna hitsena.
Avy indray, (avy indray)
Sy handray famonjena.
Ka hihoby hoe:
Haleloia, hôsana!
Ho Anao Tomponay.

'Njay manako, henoy
'Zany feon'ny trômpetra,
Mitory et?,
Fa efa tonga ny fetra.
Vorina izao
Ireo mpino rehetra.
Moa vonona va?

Raha tonga anio
Kristy'Zay famonjena,
Ry namako ô,
Ianao va hekena? Hiakatra ar?
Ho any Jerosalema?
Moa vonona va?
